---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One sentence describing what you want.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve or what use case does it unlock?

## Proposed Solution

How you imagine it working — commands, behavior, output format, etc.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about, and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, prior art, or anything else relevant.
